title: Alone vs Lonely
quote: I came to the conclusion that I would take actually being alone over feeling lonely in a relationship every day of the week.
excerpt: I came to the conclusion that I would take actually being alone over feeling lonely in a relationship every day of the week. At least when you're alone, you're not being gaslit into thinking the problem is you.

title: Jurassic Park
quote: Dating was a walk in the park. Jurassic Park.
excerpt: Dating was a walk in the park. Jurassic Park. The men who were functional and emotionally astute had been snatched up years ago. What remained was trying to eat you.

title: Failing Fabulously
quote: I wasn't a failure. I was fabulous. Or I was failing fabulously.
excerpt: I went from a size 8 to a size 14. And you know what? It didn't bother me all that much. Because I finally worked out what actually mattered.

title: Universal Values
quote: Love. Enthusiasm. And McDonald's. Universal values.
excerpt: Sometimes parenting isn't about Pinterest-perfect meals or organic everything. Sometimes it's about survival, enthusiasm, and the occasional drive-through.

title: On Woolworths Bras and Seatbelts Disguised as Straps
quote: Thirty is the year your lingerie stops being flirtation and starts being infrastructure.
excerpt: Thirty is the year your lingerie stops being flirtation and starts being infrastructure. The day I stood in the Woolworths fitting room holding a bra the approximate size of a small bridge and thought this makes complete sense — that was the day I understood I'd crossed a threshold.

title: Turning Thirty and Other Acts of Defiance
quote: I turned thirty in a pandemic, alone, with a toddler who'd just discovered the word 'no'.
excerpt: I turned thirty in a pandemic, alone, with a toddler who'd discovered 'no' and a cat who'd discovered gravity. It was less a celebration and more a survival milestone.

title: Dating Apps and the Art of Low Expectations
quote: There's something deeply unsexy about swiping through profiles while your child asks why the man in the photo has a fish.
excerpt: There's something deeply unsexy about swiping through profiles while your child asks why the man in the photo has a fish. Dating as a single parent is less romance, more logistics.

title: My Body at Thirty: A User's Manual
quote: My body and I have reached an understanding.
excerpt: My body and I have reached an understanding. It does its job, I try not to hate it, and we both pretend the stretch marks are tiger stripes. It's a truce, not a love story.
